title: Big Cats and Rabbits
description: Scale up cats and rabbits to be pixel consistent and easier to click!
body:
Scale up cats and rabbits to be pixel consistent and easier to click!\
Also increases rabbit jump strength (0.42 -> 0.5) and safe fall distance (3.0 -> 6.0) to be proportional.\
\
This does not apply to ocelots, as they are already pixel consistent.\
This may conflict with Farmer's Delight, which also scales up rabbits.
